title: Euphonic Sessions with Kyau & Albert - November 2023
description:
01 Durante ft Running Touch - Remedy  [Anjunadeep]
02 Jam & Spoon - Stella (Chris Cargo Remix) [Black Hole]
03 Purple Disco Machine x Duke Dumont x Nothing But Thieves - Something On My Mind (Solomun Remix) [Insanity Records]
04 David Di Sabato & Deviu - Divergence (Artaria Remix) [Euphonic Visions]
05 Sherano - I Should Know  [Elpida Music]
06 High 5 - As Long As It Takes (Tomas Heredia Remix) [Amon Vision]
07 SHato - Stimulus [Euphonic]
08 Simon Doty - Lady Danger [Anjunadeep]
09 David Broaders - Undertow [Euphonic]
10 Alex Sonata & TheRio - Drifting Lights  [Anjunabeats]
11 Sander van Doorn - L'Annonce Des Couleur [Spinnin' Records] [TRACK OF THE MONTH]
12 Binary Finary - 1998 (Victor Ruiz Remix) [Armada]
13 Sinsonic - Motions [FSOE Clandestine]
14 Redraft Memories - 1992 (Martin Bundsen Remix) [Music Over Matter]
15 Something Good  ft Sansa - Before Dawn (Solardo Remix) [Armada]
16 Johan Gielen presents Airscape ft Shakespeakers - Satellites [Black Hole]
17 Bodo Kaiser - Catch My Breath [Alter Ego Progressive]
18 Tunnel Signs - Rubber Feet [Air Signs Music]
19 Terry Gaters - Romansu [Emergent Shores]
20 Baud Rate - Azores [Alter Ego Progressive]
21 Nico de Andrea x Eli & Fur - Start The Fire [Armada]
22 Discognition - We Came From The Stars [LTN pres. Ghostbeat Remix] [AVA Deep]

24 Disfunktion & Kris ONeil - U & Me [Enprog]
25 Claxy - Closer  [Anjunadeep]
